commands.summary: New test 'exposes local-only channels and a gated companion route': /api/diagnostics reports local_only=true with no provider, lists the local + twilio channels, and companion='planned'; /api/companion/status requires the bearer token (401) and is disabled by default (503, enabled=false, status=planned).
63 node tests pass, 1 skipped (live Twilio), renderer interaction suite green.

environment.process_note: 015 Phase 1 complete. CLV-004: a native 'local' channel adapter delivers into the local inbox with no provider; /api/diagnostics reports local-only mode and the channel list; Settings shows local-only mode; the agent-to-human approval loop (agent_messages) is already local and is covered by existing renderer tests. CLV-005: decisions/0006 designs the LAN-first mobile companion protocol (QR pairing, Ed25519 device identity, key exchange, signed decisions, redaction, revocation/lost-device, desktop as source of truth, LAN vs future relay distinction, approvals without SMS). CLV-006: a planned companion route is authenticated and disabled by default (503) with no public relay semantics, unit-tested.
